title: Song: My Hobbies
objectives: Practise hobby vocabulary in a musical context

key_concepts.explanation:
I enjoy riding my bike, fast and free,
I like skating in the park; it's fun for my friends and me.
I enjoy building blocks on my bedroom floor,
High towers that almost fall.

I enjoy drawing pictures, with colours so bright,
I go diving in the pool, splashing water everywhere.
I enjoy crafting things at home, with glue and glitter, yes!
Hobbies make me smile all day. Come and join, let's run
and play! Happy hobbies just for me!

teaching_notes: This song uses 'enjoy + verb-ing' and 'like + verb-ing' with many hobby activities: riding bikes, skating, building blocks, drawing, diving, crafting. Good for acting out — students can mime each hobby as they sing. Both indoor (building, drawing, crafting) and outdoor (riding, skating, diving) hobbies are included.
